kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\mikap\\OneDrive\\Asiakirjat\\Metropolia opiskelu\\Terveysteknologia\\Bettertrainingapp\\bettertrainingapp\\tests\\browser\\traces\\temp\\d82faf29-c4ca-4912-9f00-ddcc252fcb25"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Check Checkbox
kw.doc: Checks the checkbox or selects radio button found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Check Checkbox
kw.doc: Checks the checkbox or selects radio button found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.arg: (el) => { el.value = '#ff0000'; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); }
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
